results.title: Surflo: Consistent 3D Surface Flow from a Global State
results.content:
## Overview

## One global state, One coherent surface

Modern feed-forward 3D models — VGGT, DUSt3R,
DepthAnything-3 — produce a pointmap per view. The representation grows linearly with the number of views, and leads to both noise and redundancy.  
Surflo encodes the entire image set into a
global state z —
one fixed-size representation, regardless of how many views you
provide. From it, we decode a single coherent surface at whichever
resolution we ask for.

The result is a representation of geometry that, by construction,
captures only what is shared across views.

Geometry is what remains invariant under transformations of view.

Surflo: a single coherent surface decoded from one global state
VGGT: per-view pointmaps stacked across views

## Decoding explicit surfaces [...] lower is better

### F1-score ↑

higher is better

Surflo still performs better than the baselines when changing the number of input views. We vary the number of unposed views per scene from 2 to 32 and report
the same Chamfer Distance (CD ↓) and F1-score
(F1 ↑) on the OOD datasets Tanks & Temples and
Mip-NeRF 360. Surflo leads at every view count, including the
hard 2-view regime.

### Varying input views

### Chamfer distance ↓

lower is better

### F1-score ↑

higher is better

### Chamfer distance ↓

lower is better

### F1-score ↑

higher is better

### Chamfer distance ↓

lower is better

### F1-score ↑

higher is better

### Chamfer distance ↓

lower is better

### F1-score ↑

higher is better

### Chamfer distance ↓

lower is better

### F1-score ↑

higher is better [...] ### Ignatius

Ignatius reference photo
Surflo points
VGGT pointmaps
Surflo mesh
Gaussian Wrapping mesh

### Robot

Robot reference photo
Surflo points
VGGT pointmaps
Surflo mesh
Gaussian Wrapping mesh

## Numbers

Surflo is trained on our augmented version of DL3DV only, and evaluated on eight benchmarks — four standard novel-view synthesis datasets with reference surfaces computed from dense views using the state-of-the-art meshing method Gaussian Wrapping,
and four benchmarks with native surface
ground truth. Every method sees the same 16 unposed input views per
scene; we report Chamfer Distance (CD ↓) and F1-score
(F1 ↑).
Per-view feed-forward baselines are reported with TSDF fusion to a
single global mesh. Both Surflo rows highlighted — with and
without the shared rendering guidance.

results.title: Industrial Flow Meters & Control Valves, Calgary, Alberta | Sur-Flo Meters & Controls
results.content:
## Canadian-Made Industrial Flow Measurement Solutions

Sur-Flo manufactures paddle meters, control valves, and additional instrumentation for applications requiring dependable flow monitoring and long-term serviceability across North America. 

Our instrumentation is used in process systems where measurement accuracy, maintenance accessibility, and operational continuity directly impact production performance.

## Robust Solutions for Severe-Duty Process Applications

Sur-Flo products are engineered for process environments involving debris, scaling, abrasive materials, corrosive fluids, and high-wear operating conditions where conventional equipment may plug, deteriorate, or require frequent service intervals. [...] ### Sur-Flo Clamp-On Ultrasonic Meter

Sur-Flo clamp-on ultrasonic meters provide non-intrusive flow monitoring without pipe modification or process interruption, making them well-suited for retrofit installations and systems where downtime is not acceptable.

## Manufactured In-House in Calgary, Alberta

Sur-Flo products are designed and manufactured in-house at our Calgary, Alberta facility. That gives us direct control over product quality, consistency, lead times, and technical support without going through a third party.

Our team works directly with industrial operations across North America, providing flow measurement and pressure control equipment for demanding applications in oil and gas, mining, municipal water, pulp and paper, and general process industries. [...] ### 4520 50 Ave SE

Calgary, AB T2B 3R4

### Toll free: 1-877-527-8977

Office: 403-207-9715
Fax: 403-207-9440

### sales@sur-flo.net

## INDUSTRY FLOWS THROUGH US

## Industrial Flow Measurement and Pressure Control Solutions | Sur-Flo Meters & Controls

Sur-Flo Meters & Controls builds Canadian-made flow meters, control valves, and flow monitoring equipment for high-debris and high-corrosion industrial applications. Manufactured in Calgary, Alberta, our products are designed to reduce maintenance, minimise downtime, and support reliable long-term operation in oil and gas, mining, municipal water, and other demanding process industries.

## Canadian-Made Industrial Flow Measurement Solutions

results.title: Sur-Flo Meters and Controls Ltd - Industry Flows Through Us.
results.content:
## Overview
At Sur-Flo, we’ve been working with companies across North America since 1979 to provide simple and robust flow measurement and control technology. Our dedication to simple and effective designs has saved our clients countless hours of time and operational cost savings. Our products step away from conventional design to provide you with a product that is simple, reliable, and robust. As a family-built company, our core value has always been to put our customers first. We focus on providing quality products that are second to none, manufactured locally in our facility in Alberta, Canada. Delivering our products on time and to our customer’s satisfaction is what we do best. We can confidently say that once you try a Sur-Flo product, you won’t accept any substitute.

### Website [...] These in-person conversations are where solutions take shape and where the best ideas come from – and we love every minute of it! Our SF10V back pressure control valves play a critical role in maintaining system stability, protecting equipment, and optimizing performance; and seeing how they’re applied in the field is what keeps us passionate about what we do 🔥 Shoutout to our very own Grant Matheson who took the lead on showcasing our SF10V back pressure control valve 🫡 Let’s keep the conversations flowing! sales@sur-flo.net #OEMmanufacturer #BackPressureControl #FieldProven #BuiltForTheField #ShareSolutions [Likes: 16, Comments: 1]; Sur-Flo Meters and Controls Ltd (1mo): 🛠️ OEM manufacturing, without the bottlenecks. At Sur‑Flo, precision isn’t just about how parts are made - it’s about [...] it’s responsive. Reach out to our sales team, we're always happy to chat about how we can support your projects 🤝 sales@sur-flo.net #oemmanufacturer #controlvalves #flowmeters #instrumentation #customization [Likes: 9, Comments: 0]; Sur-Flo Meters and Controls Ltd (1mo): Today, we are proud to celebrate a major milestone for one of our own. Joel Cameron is officially marking five years with the Sur-Flo team! 🥳 Since joining us, Joel has been a vital part of our growth as a company and within the technical sales team. His knowledge and commitment to finding the right solutions for our clients, while supporting his fellow colleagues, have made him stand out as a key member of the team. 👏 Thank you for your hard work and dedication Joel, and for being a driving force behind our success for

# SURFLO® ETFE I.V. Catheters

With an ultra-sharp double-bevel introducer needle and medical-grade lubricant, the SURFLO ETFE I.V. catheter allows easier penetration and smoother travel through tissue. The clear, sure-grip hub features a preview chamber to indicate proper placement, while the large inner diameter of the catheter assures good blood flow.

results.title: Shurflo Water Pumps
results.content:
# SHURflo Water Pumps

Small yet high performance, water pumps and fluid handling equipment, systems and accessories for the Floor care, Industrial, Marine, and Recreational Vehicle industries have been manufactured by SHURflo since 1968. Originally based out of Southern California, SHURflo now globally distributes products through a network of original and well established equipment manufacturers. Below a selection of SHURflo water pumps are provided for exploration to best accommodate your needs.

## Shurflo 12 Volt Aqua King Standard Fresh Water Pump [...] ## SHURflo Smart Sensor 4.0 Pump

Specifically designed for the mid-sized RV, this variable speed pump is controlled by a microprocessor which enables a silent delivery of 4.0 GPM up to 50 psi. Features includes a high flow 4 chambered design, valve passages that are extra large, and variable speed with no cycling. Showers are more enjoyable, dual-fixture flow is impressive, and a performance that is ultra-quiet.

SHURflo Smart Sensor 4.0 Pump

View more SHURflo water pumps

RV Parts

Copyright © 2011 Shurflo Water Pump. All rights reserved. [...] ## SHURflo Multi-Fixture Demand Water Pump 3.5GPM 2088

The SHURflo Multi-Fixture Demand Water Pump has a magnet motor that is permanent, heavy-duty, and responsible for low current consumption. Minimal sound is generated since the drive is made with a double ball bearing system. New Snap action switch is low profile and easy to install.

SHURflo Multi-Fixture Demand Water Pump 3.5GPM 2088

## SHURflo Nautilus Single Station Water Pump 1 GPM

SHURflo Nautilus Single Station Water Pump is designed with the single fixture RV in mind. With 1 GPM amp draw is minimal at only 2.5 amps. Thermally protected are the 3/8" barb components ensuring that no heat damage occurs.

SHURflo Nautilus Single Station Water Pump 1 GPM

## SHURflo Water Pump 115V & 12V 2.8 GPM

# SHURFlo Pumps

Home > Product Lines > Pump Distributor > SHURFlo

| SHURFlo Pumps | [...] | 8000 Series  Pumps | ShurFlo's most widely used industrial pump. Spherially shaped valves with automatic demand switch or bypass available. Consistent, dependable operation and priming. Up to 1.8 GPM. Available in a variety of chemically resistant materials. Available in 12V, 24V, 36V, 115V, and 230V. |
| 5000 Series  Pumps | High-flow pump with unique one-piece co-molded diaphragm for long life and top performance. Heavy-duty sealed motor. Self-priming. Upt to 5.3GPM. Run dry without damage. |
| 2088 Series  Pumps | High-flow, moderate pressure for use in spraying and transfer applications. Self-priming up to 12 ft. Can run dry without damage. Automatic demand with built-in check valve (on most models). flow up to 4.0 GPM | [...] | Model Numbers | Descriptions |
| Model 300  Metering Pumps | Ideal for slurries, viscous, shear-sensitive and agressive fluids. No contamination of pump or fluid. Prevents backflow and siphoning. Self-priming to 30 feet. Up to 60 psi; 11oz./minute. Extremely accurate for dosing applications. |
| Model 477  AODD Pumps | Dual diaphragm design and pneumatic spool valve provides exceptionally long life and consistent flow. Specialized elastomers allow compatibility with the most caustic or acidic fluids. Up to 10 GPM @ 100 PSI air pressure. Santoprene and Viton models available. Can run dry without damage. |
